hero.headline:
Your Backyard Dream Built to
Last a Lifetime
hero.subheadline: Your outdoor space should be a place you never want to leave. Creekside Outdoor Living designs and builds stunning landscapes, pools, and patios across Northwest Indiana — so you can stop imagining and start living outside.

services.label: What We Build
services.headline: Complete Outdoor Living<br class="hidden md:block"> From Vision to Reality
services.subtitle: Stop dreaming about a better backyard and start living in one. From custom pools to full landscape makeovers, we handle every detail so you can enjoy the result.

cards.title: Landscape Design & Build
cards.description: Full-service design and construction with 3D rendering technology. Custom patios, hardscapes, retaining walls, walkways, and driveways tailored to your vision.

cards.title: Custom Swimming Pools
cards.description: Beautiful fiberglass pools by Leisure Pools, designed and installed to integrate seamlessly with your landscape and outdoor living spaces.

cards.title: Outdoor Living Spaces
cards.description: Outdoor kitchens, fire pits, water features, lighting, and entertainment areas that extend your home into the open air.

cards.title: Lawn Maintenance
cards.description: Weekly mowing, fertilizer programs, irrigation oversight, seasonal flowers, and cleanup services to keep your property pristine year-round.

cards.title: Snow & Ice Control
cards.description: 24/7 commercial snow removal for businesses and HOAs throughout the winter season. Safe, accessible properties guaranteed.

cards.title: Drainage & Grading
cards.description: Professional drainage solutions and grading to protect your property from water damage and ensure proper flow management.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Outdoor Space

steps.title: Share Your Vision
steps.description: Tell us how you want to live outside. We'll visit your property, listen to your ideas, and provide an honest consultation — no pressure, no obligations.

steps.title: See It Before We Build It
steps.description: Using 3D rendering technology, we create a virtual walkthrough of your project so you can experience every detail before a single shovel hits the ground.

steps.title: Live Your Best Life Outside
steps.description: Owner Mike Arnold personally oversees construction from start to finish. When we hand you the keys to your new outdoor space, all you have to do is enjoy it.

about.label: Why NWI Families Choose Us
about.headline: Owner-Led From First Sketch to Final Stone
about.description: Since 2008, Creekside Outdoor Living has been transforming backyards across Northwest Indiana and Chicagoland into places families actually want to spend time. Led by President Mike Arnold, our ICPI-certified team handles projects from $15K to $300K+ with the same hands-on care that earned us four consecutive Best of Houzz awards.

features.title: 3D Design Walkthroughs
features.description: See your project in vivid detail before construction begins. Our 3D rendering technology lets you experience every angle of your future outdoor space.

features.title: Owner On-Site Daily
features.description: Mike Arnold personally oversees daily construction operations — from concept to completion, your project is never handed off to a stranger.

features.title: 4x Best of Houzz Winner
features.description: Recognized by the largest home design platform four times for outstanding service and craftsmanship. Our reputation is earned project by project.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project is unique. We provide detailed proposals with clear pricing so you know exactly what you're investing in — with financing options available.

guarantee.headline: Our "Built Right" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If any aspect of your project doesn't meet the standards we agreed on, we'll come back and make it right at no additional cost. We use premium Unilock materials and ICPI-certified installation methods because your outdoor space should look stunning for decades, not just months.

faqs.question: How long does a typical landscape or pool project take?
faqs.answer: Project timelines vary based on scope. A patio installation might take 1-2 weeks, while a full outdoor living space with a pool can take 6-10 weeks. We provide a detailed timeline during your consultation and keep you updated throughout the process.

faqs.question: Do you offer 3D renderings before construction?
faqs.answer: Yes! Our 3D rendering technology creates a virtual walkthrough of your project so you can see exactly what your space will look like before we break ground. This collaborative design process means no surprises — only excitement.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve families and businesses throughout Northwest Indiana and Chicagoland, including Crown Point, Schererville, St. John, Munster, Dyer, Cedar Lake, and surrounding communities.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing for larger projects?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer financing options to make your dream outdoor space more accessible. During your consultation, we'll discuss budget-friendly approaches and payment plans that work for you.

faqs.question: Are your installers certified?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our team is ICPI Certified and we are an Authorized Unilock Contractor, ensuring your hardscape and landscape work meets the highest quality standards in the industry. We're also TechOPro Certified.

testimonials.name: Brandi L.
testimonials.text: Mike and his team have been amazing to work with. Very professional, great communication, and quality work!

testimonials.name: Neill O.
testimonials.text: WOW, did he and his team do fantastic and exceptional work! His recommendations were spot on, and the attention to detail from everyone during execution was spot on.

testimonials.name: Maggie M.
testimonials.text: Mike and his team were wonderful to work with. Mike was so accommodating with last-minute changes and the final result exceeded our expectations.

contact.headline:
Ready to Love Your
Outdoor Space?
contact.subtitle: Get a free design consultation and see your project in 3D before we build. No pressure, no obligations — just an honest conversation about your vision.
